name: Oriental Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 Skinned boned chicken breasts, 1 1/4 lb cut into thin strips
1 medium Red bell pepper, seeded and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, blend together 6 tablespoons water, soy sauce, cornstarch, and sugar.
2. In a large skillet over high heat, cook chicken and ginger in 1 tablespoon oil, stirring until the chicken is lightly browned and cooked through. Remove to serving platter.
3. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet. Add vegetables and cook, stirring until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Return chicken to the skillet with the soy sauce mixture. Cook until the sauce thickens and chicken is heated through.
